guidance: Optimistic on KUSUM 2.0 momentum and state-level solar pump demand.
PM-KUSUM commissioning deadline extended to 31 Mar 2027 aids execution.
Margin defence via backward integration amid input-cost volatility.
insights: FY26 record revenue ₹2,698cr; Q4 ₹858cr; FY26 PAT ₹257cr.
Q4 solar pump installations +51% YoY; 86,086 units FY26 (+20%).
Order book ~₹1,500cr (as of 7 May) gives strong near-term visibility.
EBITDA margin ~16%, pressured by raw-material costs; receivable cycle improved.
concall.orderExecution: ~₹1,500cr book executable within ~12 months; KUSUM deadline extension de-risks the timeline.
concall.source: Shakti Pumps Q4 FY26 concall, May 11 2026; Whalesbook, InvestyWise, ScanX, company update
